rootCause: The Manage Quests search Playwright test created quests with the 4-character description "desc", which violates the quest builder's 10-character minimum. The form validation blocked saving, so no quests were stored and the search results were empty, causing the test to time out waiting for one row.
resolution: Update the test to hydrate the quest form, provide a valid description length, require the "Create Quest" button to be enabled, and assert the success status banner so future runs fail immediately if quest creation is rejected.
